Class EventCard

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card.Card
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Card.EventCard
public class EventCard extends Card
Represents an event card in the Mesos deck. Unlike tribe-member cards, event cards cannot be selected by players — they fire automatically when they come off the market and apply their EventEffect to all players.

  • Field Summary

    cardType, era

  • Constructor Details

    • EventCard

      public EventCard(ERA era, CARD_TYPE cardType, int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType, EventEffect eventEffect)
      Creates a new EventCard with a pre-bound effect strategy.
      Parameters:
      era - the era this card belongs to.
      cardType - the card type (should be CARD_TYPE.EVENT).
      eventID - the unique event identifier.
      eventType - the category of event (hunt, sustenance, etc.).
      eventEffect - the effect to execute when this event fires.

    • EventCard

      public EventCard(ERA era, CARD_TYPE cardType, int eventID, EVENT_TYPE eventType)
      Constructor without a bound effect; call setEventEffect(EventEffect) before triggering.
      Parameters:
      era - the era this card belongs to.
      cardType - the card type (should be CARD_TYPE.EVENT).
      eventID - the unique event identifier.
      eventType - the category of event (hunt, sustenance, etc.).

  • Method Details

    • setEventEffect

      public void setEventEffect(EventEffect eventEffect)
      Binds the effect strategy to this event card.
      Parameters:
      eventEffect - the effect to execute when this event fires.

    • getEventID

      public int getEventID()
      Returns the unique event identifier.
      Returns:
      the event ID.

    • getEventType

      public EVENT_TYPE getEventType()
      Returns the category of this event.
      Returns:
      the event type (hunt, sustenance, shamanic ritual, or paintings).

    • applyEventEffect

      public void applyEventEffect(List<Player> PlayersList)
      Fires the bound event effect on all players.
      Parameters:
      PlayersList - the list of players participating in the event.

    • addCardToPlayer

      public void addCardToPlayer(Player player) throws NotSelectableCardException
      Description copied from class: Card
      Adds this card to the given player, applying any immediate effects.
      Specified by:
      addCardToPlayer in class Card
      Parameters:
      player - the player who receives the card.
      Throws:
      NotSelectableCardException - always — event cards cannot be chosen by players.

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      Overrides:
      equals in class Object
      Parameters:
      obj - the object to compare against.
      Returns:
      true if obj is an EventCard with the same event ID.

    • toDTO

      public CardDTO toDTO()
      Description copied from class: Card
      Converts this card to a data-transfer object for network transport.
      Specified by:
      toDTO in class Card
      Returns:
      an EventDTO snapshot of this card for network transfer.

    • matchesDTO

      public boolean matchesDTO(CardDTO dto)
      Checks whether this event card matches the provided DTO by comparing card type and event ID.
      Specified by:
      matchesDTO in class Card
      Parameters:
      dto - the DTO to compare against this card.
      Returns:
      true if the DTO represents an EventCard with the same event ID.
